pages.raw_text:
The plasterers will meet at their
rooms in the Rookery tonight.


The bricklayers, bartenders, league
beer drivers and painters will meet
at Central Labor hall tonight.


An elevator and bell boys union
will be launched in Spokane within
the next month. The boys have been
making plans for the past two months
to organize and it is stated that all
arrangements have been completed
The charter will be taken out in the
American Labor union.


The Legislature has passed a bill
making it unlawful in the state OF
Washington to work men more thar
eight hours in smelters. The bill was
proposed by J. II. Johnston. Mr.. John
ston asserted that the average life
of an employee in a smelter compelled
to work long hours was from sever
to eight years.
